memory_entries.text: In jd/tenacity, retry_base composition lives in tenacity/retry.py. retry_base.__and__/__or__ should construct retry_all(self, other)/retry_any(self, other) directly so regular callables on the RHS work; __rand__/__ror__ construct with (other, self). Existing regression tests are tests/test_tenacity.py::test_retry_or_with_plain_function and ::test_retry_and_with_plain_function.
